items.title: McDonald's Expands Value Menu With $3 Items
items.description: Fast-food chain rolls out low-price offerings to attract cost-conscious consumers

items.title: McDonald's will cut prices again to $3 in fast food value fight
items.description: The chain is launching new low-priced menus and $4 breakfast deals as affordability concerns have the industry focused on value

items.title: McDonald's to launch $3 value meals in US starting April, WSJ reports
items.description: March 11 (Reuters) - McDonald's will introduce menu items priced at $3 or less, along with $4 breakfast meal deals in the U.S., starting in April, the Wall Street Journal reported on Wednesday, as the

items.title: McDonald’s Preps New Discounts to Feed Budget-Minded Diners for $3 or Less
items.description: The burger chain will introduce a lower-priced menu and new $4 breakfast meal deals, as it seeks to reclaim its value image.

items.title: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao net worth surpasses Bill Gates: Forbes
items.description: Forbes estimates that Binance founder Changpeng Zhao has a net worth of $110 billion.
